item.title: JOIN
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/president-donald-trump-protest-c8796556fbf20e796f42167f61c3d942 Edit: Plenty whining about this post not being tagged. Reasons:l given - we want to escape and have fun ! - I’m not from the us, so I just want to see the memes ! - and probably some more ‘sofisticated’ arguments… No sorry, not this one. The daily political stuff is tagged, always, this is SOCIAL MEDIA at its finest: a communication platform to call for unity against fascism.. Swipe harder and faster if a call to action rallying against fascism annoys you. Maybe also reevaluate your priorities. Unbelievable.
item.dc:creator: MyVerySmarterUserName

item.title: ‘This is a coup’: Trump and Musk’s purge is cutting more than costs, say experts
item.description: “In the US, we appeal rulings we disagree with – we don’t ignore court orders or threaten judges with impeachment just because we don’t like the decision. This is a coup, plain and simple,” Arizona’s attorney general, Kris Mayes, said. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/feb/17/trump-musk-government-cost-cutting-coup

item.title: 16th favourite for the trophy (plus it's a true thing and my therapist is amazing at making me think this way)
item.description: Original post https://imgur.com/gallery/evpQBcP I have an amazing therapist who has helped me see that just because the normies do things a certain way, doesn't mean I have to do them that way. I can do whatever helps my brain. It's hard to unlearn a lifetime of habits, but small things have really changed how I function.

item.title: Happy borthday imgur!
item.description:
I hurd there was a borthday. so I searched my phone for the word cake and heres some of what came up. you can tell the fun things I has on my phone. Am planning to start back up posting shortly and turns out I hadnt sorted nine of my old posts before taking a break. so I will return shortly. *please stand by*
love you all! see you soon with the over 3k now memes I have saved up on my phone!

item.title: Like, if he had actually killed two random Palestinian's he'd probably get a Presidential pardon
item.description: Literally this https://www.haaretz.com/us-news/2025-02-17/ty-article/man-arrested-in-miami-beach-after-shooting-two-israelis-he-thought-were-palestinians/00000195-1481-d0af-a197-de9504cd0000
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: I'm literally the worst
item.description: Parents are divorced, although Bible MAGA dumbfucks. I'm the only one in my 8 person family with no college experience. My dad is Maga and has been taking social security. I worry for him. My siblings are crippled with debt from college (although my sister, who's my only remaining family member, got her debt settled. My brother is over 1M in debt to Sally may for fuel expenses) My mom, I have no idea. She gets to have no part of my life. I've worked my ass off in hospitality. My secondary forte is customer retention. I've been told numerous times I've changed the small town I moved to, for the better. I've saved numerous lives with my friendship. I go out to eat everyday, and never look at my bank account. And I love me. But im trans, everything wrong with this country, and honestly just the worst person, with no direction or worth in life. Fuck me I guess.
item.dc:creator: kitenkatt

item.title: 16th pic
item.dc:creator: nizbit

item.title: Just in time for family day!
item.description: For context: my mom is a narcissist who is also bipolar and is unregulated because she doesn't think there's anything wrong with her - because she's a narcissist. She's been verbally and emotionally abusive my entire life and for the last 10 years I've kept her at arm's length, seeing her only for holidays and birthdays, because I didn't have the guts to fully cut her off. But now it's finally done and it's a huge weight of my shoulders. Part of me feels guilty and I just need to remind myself that she brought this upon herself by refusing to apologize for or even acknowledge any of her wrongdoings. Anyways, rant over. Thanks for coming to my TED talk.
item.dc:creator: LoTRFanatic42

item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: Ladies we need to talk
item.description: 14: bled through a pad I had changed 30 minutes prior and my mom thought I was living and told me to do better. 16: threw up after cooking class in high-school because my period pain was so bad. 16 - 19: thankfully after this incident my mom finally took me seriously and started to really push my doctor for help. I tried 13 different birth controls and they put me on depo because it stopped my periods. It was a short term solution as it's not good to take this forever. 19: finaly diagnosed with endometriosis. Has surgery. Stopped having pain for 3 months. 23: finally got checked again for endro after being told for years that they got it all in the first surgery. Had second surgery. 27: still suffering from pain was referred to gyno and told birth control was my only option. Tried another wackload of pills, was also diagnosed with PCOS and told to lose weight and exercise. 31: hospitalized from pain every month for 1 year and given iron supplements for anemia. Has sever bloodless over christmas this year and almost need a transfusion. 32 - 38: have taken at least 1 day off per month around my period because of pain. Coworkers and bosses know why which is humiliating. I get pale skin, fever, pain, vomiting etc. It is hell. 39: get new doctor. New doctor asks why I haven't tried Dienogest. What's that? Fucking pills for endometriosis. Try it. Holy effing balls man. No pain. NO PAIN for the first time since I got my period at 13 years old. If you are a woman and my story sounds similar I created this post in hopes that my story helps you and you can go ask your doctor for this. I don't know what it would cost in the US but here in canada I don't have extended medical and its only costing me $27 a month and it has changed my life. Like literally changed it. Please for the love of God ladies advocate for yourself and get these pills if you have endro or PCOS and take you life back. If you have questions I probably can't help with lots of them because I'm not a doctor. So go see a doc!!!
item.dc:creator: veesee

item.title: Vermont Protest 2/17
item.description: There are more of us than there are of them. We have something they don't- integrity. Vermont showed up today to say we don't tolerate hate and we don't tolerate fascism.

item.dc:creator: Rubyrose99

item.title: It’s wild to reflect back on how so many of us felt 15 years ago.
item.description: I really thought the George W years would be the worst president of my lifetime. We would move forward and progress as a society. I really think that if the congress/senate/etc who were old af back then had realized they should step down because they couldn’t wrap their heads around an online age, we would be in a different era. Their desperately clinging to power and refusing to move aside for the younger people really hamstrung this country with digital warfare. We are in a third world war, and Russia (et al.) are winning. Tik tok is a national threat, but Elon’s take over of twitter wasn’t, why? There aren’t laws in place to analyze and evaluate where funding is coming from. They’re starting to finally take a stand on anything having to do with social media and it’s just “china is bad.” Basically this is the bad place.

item.title: The Long Black Smooth Caulk
item.dc:creator: JagerSuperStar

item.title: I Did a Protest Today
item.description:
My sign had two messages: Trump Administration = Dead Democracy We Need a lot of Bleach to Remove a lot of Orange Stains
https://www.wkyc.com/article/news/local/cleveland/crowds-protest-trump-administration-policies-presidents-day-cleveland/95-32aee78e-1d91-4ae9-918a-3520b700def6 Mind you this is my first protest...ever. And I was nervous. But was calmed by the people participating and there were police monitoring to make sure nothing bad happened. I am just happy I got out of my comfort zone and did it. I would have taken pictures but my hands were in pain from the cold and despite wearing gloves. I still want to believe that protesting is a way to bring awareness of issues and those watching take note. There's an issue and it should be heard, especially with the current state of things of our government.
